summary: Workflow has critical shell safety issues: line 47 uses unquoted $(cat commits.txt), risking word-splitting on spaces in commit messages. Lines 52-55 use fragile grep/sed output parsing that breaks if index.ts changes format—should output JSON instead. Missing set -euo pipefail in bash. Script modules are well-separated (version, commits, bumper, files, git) and mostly use async/await correctly, but error handling is inconsistent. Workflow lacks error handling for failed bun run. Not production-ready without robustness fixes.
